title: Nergal and Ereshkigal: Love in the Underworld
description: The sky god Nergal descends to the underworld, seduces Queen Ereshkigal, and becomes king of the dead.
introduction: The sky god Nergal descends to the underworld, seduces Queen Ereshkigal, and becomes king of the dead.

translation.text: Nergal descended through the seven gates. When he saw Ereshkigal, his heart was seized with desire.
